creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, 17 Mar 2011 08:40:12 GMT
Grzegorz Blach <magik@roorback.net> mentioned:

> The following reply was made to PR ports/154402; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Grzegorz Blach <magik@roorback.net>
> To: FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org, freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: ports/154402: updates for enlightenment 0.17 and related ports
> Date: Thu, 17 Mar 2011 09:36:21 +0100
> 
>  PR now is waiting almost two months for Stas, but without reply.
>  I send mail to him on 2011-02-20, also without reply.
>  
>  I thing this a time to use maintainer timeout rule.
> 

Grzegorz, Martin Wilke is working on it.  I believe he was going
to commit it soon.  Sorry for the delay, I didn't have much time
recently. :-(

-- 
Stanislav Sedov
ST4096-RIPE
